worker_profile.launch_summary: pi implementer: provider=openai-codex model=gpt-5.5 reasoning=xhigh mode=fast

completed_slices.summary: Implemented and committed the Herdr live worker activity painter, with the previous clippy ptr_arg failure repaired by using &Path for painter helper inputs.
public_interfaces_changed: Added hidden internal CLI subcommand `khazad-doom cockpit paint-worker-activity`.
Added `PiActivityFormatter` in `src/pi_contract.rs` for centralized Pi event display rendering.

acceptance_status.criterion: A read-only worker activity painter can follow a Herdr wrapper stdout.ndjson artifact with tail-F semantics and render live Pi worker activity in the worker pane.
acceptance_status.evidence: `src/cli.rs` adds the display-only painter, offset-based file following, partial-line handling, and terminal-artifact exit; `src/workflow/cockpit.rs` wires it into Herdr worker panes. `cargo test worker_activity_painter --quiet` passed.

acceptance_status.criterion: All Pi event interpretation for the painter goes through src/pi_contract.rs; no new module parses Pi wire-format event names or fields directly.
acceptance_status.evidence: The painter calls `PiActivityFormatter` from `src/pi_contract.rs`; verification grep found no Pi event-name parsing in `src` outside `src/pi_contract.rs` except tests/fixtures.

acceptance_status.criterion: High-volume message_update/token deltas are throttled or compacted for human display without dropping the underlying daemon-owned artifact data.
acceptance_status.evidence: `PiActivityFormatter` compacts text/thinking/tool-call deltas with bounded flushes while only reading, never modifying, stdout.ndjson. `worker_activity_painter_compacts_high_volume_token_deltas` passed under `cargo test pi_contract --quiet`.

acceptance_status.criterion: The worker correctness path is unchanged: Khazad-Doom still reads wrapper stdout/stderr/status/exit/result artifacts, never Herdr pane text, terminal scrollback, or Herdr agent-status metadata.
acceptance_status.evidence: `src/workflow/manager.rs` still waits for wrapper launch and collects wrapper artifacts; the pane command only paints stdout and then waits for the wrapper exit. Docs/invariants state KD artifact files remain source of truth.

acceptance_status.criterion: The painter is not an authority channel: it accepts no worker instructions, answers, approvals, or manual result JSON, and operator actions still go through daemon commands such as answer or cancel.
acceptance_status.evidence: The painter CLI only accepts artifact paths and interval, prints a display-only/operator-command notice, and has no input/result-capture path. README/skill updates keep answer/cancel routed through daemon commands.

acceptance_status.criterion: If the painter process crashes or is killed while the Pi worker continues, the worker attempt completes, fails, or is cancelled according to the same daemon-owned wrapper/result path as before; the failure is at most a non-fatal cockpit visibility incident.
acceptance_status.evidence: `worker_activity_pane_command` runs the wrapper in the background, runs the painter non-authoritatively, logs painter nonzero exit as non-fatal, then waits on the wrapper and returns the wrapper status.

acceptance_status.criterion: A bounded recorded event-stream fixture derived from HERDR/RPL dogfood artifacts is promoted into tests and covers message, tool, turn, unknown-field, and unknown-event tolerance for the painter/contract path.
acceptance_status.evidence: `tests/fixtures/rpl_worker_activity.ndjson` was added and exercised by `worker_activity_painter_renders_recorded_fixture_tolerantly`; `cargo test pi_contract --quiet` and `cargo test worker_activity_painter --quiet` passed.

assumptions: `HERDR_E2E=1 cargo test herdr_worker_wrapper_real --quiet` was left to daemon full verification to avoid manually driving real Herdr/cockpit environment side effects.

completed_slices.summary: Implemented the gate/repair Herdr pane painter as a hidden read-only cockpit command over daemon status/progress data, wired the Integration Gate / Repair pane to it with non-fatal painter failure handling, added active/idle unit coverage, and documented the daemon-owned evidence boundary.
public_interfaces_changed: Added hidden internal CLI command: khazad-doom cockpit paint-gate-activity --run <id> --interval-ms <ms>
Herdr Integration Gate / Repair pane now runs the gate/repair activity painter instead of status --follow

acceptance_status.criterion: The Integration Gate / Repair Herdr pane can render live daemon-owned gate or repair command activity while a command is running and falls back to the existing daemon feed/status summary otherwise.
acceptance_status.evidence: src/workflow/cockpit.rs wires the pane to cockpit paint-gate-activity; src/cli.rs renders active integration_gate/integration_repair progress and falls back to RunDetails.feed when idle. Unit tests cover both modes.

acceptance_status.criterion: Gate/repair painter input comes only from daemon-owned gate/shell artifacts or status feed data; it never reads Herdr pane scrollback or UI state as workflow evidence.
acceptance_status.evidence: paint-gate-activity fetches daemon status via Client and uses RunDetails progress/feed only. No Herdr pane text, scrollback, or UI state APIs are read.

acceptance_status.criterion: The gate/shell correctness path is unchanged: command exit status, stdout/stderr artifacts, typed gate results, repair decisions, verification, and handoff readiness remain daemon-owned.
acceptance_status.evidence: Only cockpit/CLI painter and docs changed; gate/shell/manager correctness paths were not modified. cargo test gate --quiet passed.

acceptance_status.criterion: Renderer failures are non-fatal visibility incidents and do not change gate result, repair policy, run status, slice status, merge, or handoff behavior.
acceptance_status.evidence: gate_activity_pane_command wraps painter failures as a stderr warning and exits 0; painter output is not consumed by workflow decisions.

acceptance_status.criterion: Live command output is rate-limited or compacted so verbose gates remain readable without losing the underlying artifacts.
acceptance_status.evidence: Painter polls at a bounded interval, displays only the last six compact tail lines, and truncates long lines while leaving daemon shell/gate result storage unchanged.

acceptance_status.criterion: Tests cover both active command rendering and idle summary rendering without requiring Herdr for the normal cargo test suite.
acceptance_status.evidence: Added gate_activity_painter_renders_active_command_from_daemon_progress and gate_activity_painter_falls_back_to_idle_feed_summary unit tests; cargo test gate_activity_painter --quiet passed without Herdr.

assumptions: Current live gate command output is exposed through daemon RunDetails progress/output_tail and feed data; no new gate/shell correctness artifacts were needed.
